name: Chicken Soup (Constance)
recipeIngredient: 1 Beef marrow bone, cut into pieces
2 Chicken carcasses, plus chicken feet if possible
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the marrow bone, chicken carcasses, and giblets in a large pot with 2 liters of water.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, then skim off any impurities.
3. Reduce heat to maintain a slow simmer.
4. Chop vegetables (parsnip, carrots, swede, onion, celery).
5. After the soup has been simmering for about 30 minutes, add the chopped vegetables and parsley stems.
6. Continue cooking for approximately 2 hours.
7. Strain the broth, reserving the carrots and giblets.
8. Return reserved carrots and giblets to the soup; season with salt to taste.
9. Cook noodles in boiling water until al dente, then drain.
10. Divide noodles among 8 soup plates.
11. Ladle the soup over each plate and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
12. Serve hot.
